Lowkey.description: This skinny little outcast goes where he pleases when he pleases, and is seldom noticed by anyone until he decides to play one of his tricks on them.  For the right price, he'll teach you one or two.

Inebriated man.description: His clothes are stained with a disgusting cocktail of bodily fluids, and you wisely give the walking biohazard a wide berth as he passes by, a swarm

Darcy.description: The nimble young lass lends a smile and a sympathetic ear where she can as she scurries about behind the bar.

Anduvarii.description: The dwarf is hunchbacked and grotesquely ugly, but he is a master smith unrivaled by any locals, and most foreigners as well.

Brundii.description: She rocks back and forth in her chair, humming some familiar, motherly

Hyena.description: The beast is half starved and you can tell by the way its eyes track your movements that it considers you a potential meal.

Mjenla.description: She is clad in tight leathers, where she is clad at all, and decorated in strings of claws and teeth.  The way she moves makes you wonder what else she may have for sale.

Muncel.description: Muncel knows sausage; sweet, spicy, breakfast, you name it he's made it. He waves you over with wrinkled, greasy fingers that somewhat resemble

Gavric.description: A tall, imposing human trader with a well-groomed beard and a keen eye for profitable deals. He wears a fine silk tunic and several rings adorned with precious stones, showcasing his success in the trading business.

Tipsy officer.description: The officer is quite clearly drunk, and is quite clearly trying to hide that fact as he staggers home from a night of carousing.

Shining one.description: Looking directly at the creature is somewhat painful, akin to staring at the sun.  It emits a soothing warmth, calming your soul.

Soldier-priest.description: The Barcian clergy are taught to go into battle with a spell in their hands and a song on their lips, bolstering the spirits of their fellow soldiers and calling down the wrath of the gods upon their foes.

Predatory daemon.description: The creature is vaguely reptilian in build, walking upright but crouched low to the ground.  Two tongues flicker in and out of its mouth as it

Demagogue.description: He is naked to the waist, and spattered with the blood of a fresh sacrifice.  A halo of dark flame encircles his brow, flickering lazily.

Brynweinn.description: The woman is fair skinned with striking blue eyes.  Auburn hair hangs to

Jetis.description: An air of command hangs about the stern looking man pacing across the room, deep in contemplation of tactics and strategy.  Jetis is a master of war, on both a large, and a more personal scale.

Thracyll.description: The scars of countless battles decorate the six and a half foot frame of the grim faced warmarshal.  He is a strict but able leader, and his

Gondlir the Old.description: The old man is simply dressed in leather sandals and a cotton robe, and leans heavily on his staff.  His wrinkled face lights up with a fatherly

Hlenka.description: The pudgy old woman looks quite a home in a kitchen, spinning this way and that as she stirs pots and stokes fires.

Kasine.description: The woman is quite animated, gesturing grandly with her hands as she speaks and almost slapping a passing customer on more than one occasion.

Welcoming elf.description: With long white hair and eyes that strangely match her lavender tunic, the welcoming elf is visibly excited that you are here.

Ghost of fizbin.description: Fizbin was once the most feared pirate to sail the high seas.  His extreme greed has banished him to haunt this room and guard against invaders.

Huge female dragon.description: She is dark green as is her mate, and shares the same yellow eyes and sharp teeth.  The female of this species is much larger and more ferocious

Sea-green dragon.description: He is the dark green color of plankton rich sea.  His eyes are yellow and glare back at you angrily.  His teeth are also yellow and very sharp...

Muscular bodybuilder.description: This man is pure muscle. He struts around the beach like his sole purpose for building muscle was all for this moment.

Boras.description: Boras doesn't seem to care how his age and line of work has affected his appearance. He reeks all the way from where you stand of fish and lack of

Komura.description: The shifty elf is perched on one of the branches overseeing the city. He appears quite focused on whatever it is he is doing, keeping his attention

Nolan.description: The mysterious man grins at you as he arranges his variety of stock. He skillfully tosses flasks and potions around with incredible precision. You could swear he's using some kind of telekinesis.

Clufus.description: The man sports a pair of jewelers lenses just above his brow. He bounces between assisting customers and his workbench where he tinkers with gemstones and clothing, eager to tailor them together for added value.

Acting Captain Gonnan.description: Acting Captain Gonnan stands here vigilantly surveying the scene, occasionally dishing out orders to his "troops". His flashy appearance stands out amongst

Zekle.description: This extremely aged darkling is adorned in all black clothing and displays a wicked look as he peers about the room. The man's eyes glow a deep red ominously as he chants in an ancient language.

Eli.description: The glasses on this gnome make his eyes look twice as big as normal. He strokes his elegantly long moustache awaiting your inquiry with a blank stare.

Master of ceremonies.description: This overdressed man is very excitable, able to hype up most everyone for the spectacle of the games. He not only sells tickets, but sells the idea of the arena itself. The master of ceremonies makes an excellent salesman.

Winry.description: The hooded elf in green robes paces around the room in quiet haste. She affixes several holy trinkets around the room to bolster good omens and energy. As quickly as she moves around, she is unnaturally quiet.

Edwin.description: Edwin carries himself elegantly as he moves about. His nose always seems dug into some kind of book, scroll or parchment. You notice a faint shimmer of a glowing white aura expelling from his robe.

Lionel.description: A tall masculine man, adorned in gaudy clothing of fine silks commands

Head chef.description: The chef, a lanky ogre covered with greasy hair and reeking of elf livers,

Viserra.description: Trained by the legendary Finrodin in the forests of Evermore, Viserra was one of his star students.  She has brought those skills to bear in service to

Abeloth.description: This enormous dragon of deep black obsidian towers over you with a terrifying gaze. Its belly glows a crimson red as it prepares to envelop you

Malnar the Adventurer.description: heavy war axe from belt to hand.  Steely eyes meet yours, assessing your

Barbarian King.description: The Barbarian King stands before you in all his regal haughter.  He is very tall and well muscled and moves with cat-like grace.

Harmkin the Armourer.description: He has short, powerful fingers gained from his trade.  His face sheens with sweat from the hot confines of this tent.

Gargantuan clicker.description: How such an immense beast could walk the earth is beyond your comprehension.  It looks just like a clicker, but it's about ten

Cloanthus.description: Self-styled Archmage of the Underworld, Cloanthus appears in black robes embroidered with little evil runes.  He wields a skull-topped staff, and dead animals dangle from his belt.  But you've seen it all before. How droll.

Emissary Elondir.description: braid. His eyes, a shade of piercing green, survey the room with an air of

Poodle.description: hair, but it has been knocked askew from its owner's constant fussing. The poodle has a high-pitched yip which is rather annoying.

Vardil.description: intensity.  He has devoted his entire life to capturing and retaining beauty, yet at times he wonders whether his vision is false and his attempts futile.

City guard quartermaster.description: guard and probably wouldn't take kindly to you messing with his equipment.

Hired guard.description: He eyes you warily and rests his hands on the haft of a thick cudgel at his hip. He looks quite experienced at his job.

Serilla Festa.description: Serilla regards you from the end of a long patrician nose.  She snaps

Tiny purple crab.description: intentionally block it's path. It waves it's tiny pinchers around, perhaps in acknowledgement and scuttles off to the side.

Grey lizard.description: The lizard's slate grey skin gives it the appearance of a large stone.

Collie.description: This collie has lost its way, its master, and its herd. It has a long, thick coat of splotchy gray and white fur. Typical of its breed, it has a

Lone coyote.description: He's the last of his pack.

Massasagua.description: Prairie rattlesnakes aren't supposed to grow this big.

Karak Aka Ba.description: Clicking his mandibles in an anti-social manner, Karak Aka Ba glares at you, his chitinous face impossible to read.

Crimson clicker.description: Glowing spheres circle the clicker's insectoid head, testament to its powers.  Tongues of flame dance between its mandibles in a hypnotic pattern, threatening to spill from its mouth and singe your flesh.

Bright red beetle.description: The beetle's carapace is a uniform bright red in color, the color of fresh blood.  Is that a human hand it's carrying in those mandibles?!?

Beautiful faerie.description: The faerie flashes you a dazzling smile, winks at you, than zips away in a hurry. She was one of the most beautiful creatures you have ever seen, one of

Wolf bitch.description: potential meal for her young pups voracious appetites.

Almezar.description: Charged with protecting the forest, Almezar has been working here for all of his life and loves it dearly. He has sworn to uphold the purity and sanctity of the life in this wood, he views it as his duty and honor to Isvaelin.

Aiel.description: Having worked hard all day Aiel the caretakers' wife stands here sweating profusely. Yet in all of her daily labors she retains a beauty and nobility that leaves you envious of the recipient of her affections.

Faerie Queen.description: The faerie is scintillatingly beautiful; she flits about energetically attempting to avoid your gaze.  You have found the elusive faerie queen.

Faerie guard.description: The faerie guard looks big and intimidating, at least for a faerie anyways.

Wolverine.description: Ready to pounce upon its prey at any moment, a wolverine flashes an evil grin. A wolverine looks like an enormous weasel; it is a stocky, dark-furred, bushy tailed creature that has an enormous appetite.

Baby alligator.description: It would be so adorable if not for those sharp pointy teeth, thick hide, long snout, and yellow eyes. Well, then again, maybe not.

Kial.description: Having seen the world in ages long past, Kial is an ancient shadow that practices arts unseen by man for eons. Looking into your eyes his gaze pierces into you, passing judgment upon your soul.

Elven archer.description: The archer is quite grand in her forest camouflage attire.  She holds her bow at the ready should you take any undesirable action.

Horde of rats.description: There must be at least a hundred of the large, slimy rodents.  The stench is almost too much...

Troll.description: And you thought it was just a fairy tale, didn't you?  But here's the big ugly thing himself, grey skin, six inch nose, two inch yellow fangs

Hobgoblin.description: The hobgoblin glares dreadfully at you with its yellow eyes.  The battered ring mail it wears has rusted through in places, allowing the

Goblin.description: The goblin is a smaller, if not prettier, version of the hobgoblin. Drawing a slim sword, it advances on you.

Uruk-hai.description: The dreaded Uruk-Hai towers above your meager form, his dripping yellow fangs gleaming brightly in the darkness.  Emblazoned on his cuirass is a blood red hand surrounding the rune of dark power.  Your hand trembles as you reach

Battered kobold.description: The kobold looks hungry and tired.  He seems to ache all over, as if the ogres have been playing 'toss the kobold' with him and his comrade across the room.  His eyes plead for your mercy.

Ogre guard.description: Covered in several layers of leather, the ogre guard scowls at you coldly and closes to do battle.  The long, black, blood-tipped spear she bears has certainly ended the lives of many more powerful than yourself.

Ogre chieftess.description: Splendid in her silver finery, the ogre chieftess is nonetheless a deadly opponent, as you shall discover shortly.  Her long braids end in shrunken

Black raven.description: The raven appears content and unaggressive, but its beak and talons could most likely rip the flesh from your bones.

Large goblin chieftess.description: Dressed from head to toe in the ridiculous attire of a goblin chieftess, you nonetheless sense that she is a formidable foe.

Grunk.description: Part goblin and part, well, who knows what, but something disgusting.

Talinesian patrol captain.description: He stands firm with a steady brow, ready to destroy any Erinesian he

Bumbling mavloor.description: it's very happy doing just whatever it's doing, so why not leave it be?

Trader.description: He appears weary, yet fit, and has the weather-roughened features of a one who resides among the high peaks of the northern mountains.

Fungi.description: Eeeew!  Its green, its slimy, its all over the place!

Soldier.description: He looks very polished and professional in his uniform but the sadness in his eyes is poignointly human.

Head cleric.description: Clothed in the pure white vestments of his order, the head cleric seems thoroughly absorbed in whatever this here map is.

Elf.description: The elf is dressed in fine green attire, with a longbow slung over his shoulder and a shortsword at his waist.

Baby blue dragon.description: This little dragon is perhaps just playing with you, but play can be deadly when you have no resistance to electricity...

Dwarf shaman.description: The dwarf bears many scars, but has obviously given up his old warlike nature in favor of a peaceful approach to life.  Perhaps if you cross his palm with a reasonable amount of gold, he will share a tale with you.

Dwarven miner.description: Although the dwarf is short, she is well-armoured and mean-looking. She would have little difficulty cleaving you in two...or perhaps three.

Mountain dwarf.description: The mountain dwarves, although well armed and armoured, are the base of dwarven society.  They do most of the menial work, and are thus honored with the name 'mountain,' the lifeblood of the dwarves.

Mining lizard.description: The great lizard's slow and thoughtful pace belie its quick and deadly strike.  You hesitate to attack such a sturdy opponent.

Clay golem.description: The golem stands fearless before the temple, prepared to give what life it has in defense of its god.

Dwarf.description: These dwarves are clearly not pleased by your intteruption of the ritual. You will be done away with shortly.

Kraagnokkynar.description: Kraagnokkynar is not pleased with your intrusion!  His stone grey robes fly up dramatically as he prepares to burn you to death.

Cave troll.description: This grotesque misanthrope hails from the dawn of the world, before the creation of Man.  He is clearly jealous of your fine form.

Shrieker.description: The shrieker is a large and generally harmless mushroom.  It's only fearsome property is its ability to emit a piercing shriek, which almost always brings hostile monsters to the scene.

Mighty beholder.description: The beholder has a large central eye and ten long eyestalks.  Each eye contains a power, most of which could easily destroy you.

Tiny rock elemental.description: Made up of swirling pebbles and a rocky core, this creature seems to be a product of magical interference somewhere within the lair.

Cave wight.description: Pallid and spindly, the cave wight has large round eyes that seem to reflect the light when it hits them just so.  His movements are deft and cat-like and he seems to slither rather than walk.

Dwarven slave.description: A lifetime of slavery has taken its toll on this poor dwarf. Jagged scars upon his back are a memento of countless lashings.

Evil grunt.description: This daemonic grunt patrols the novice halls, keeping order and on the lookout for intruders. Its hooves stomp about, snarling as it paces the halls.

Evil novice.description: Not yet a full daemon, the novice's frame is twisted and malformed. Evil radiates out from him like a tangible fog, chilling to the bone.

Overseer.description: He's a large human, and he seems to enjoy whipping the orcs.

Daemon cook.description: Slightly larger than the rest, this daemon appears responsible for serving food to the lair, and he has the gut to prove it.

Rock troll.description: His face is so grey, it almost looks like granite.

Hellhound.description: Whisps of smoke curl off patches of smoldering fur, and the reek of brimstone tinges its fetid breath.  A ragged tongue lolls past broken teeth, saliva dripping to the ground with an audible sizzle.

Kennel master.description: This kennel master is clothed in black leather.

Red daemon guard.description: This demon guard is powerfully built, and his red scales make

Troll smith, yarbelek.description: Yarbelek, fabled trollsmith, appears to have been subverted.. his eyes are glazed, the will drained from him.

Red daemon overlord.description: This tall, sharp-tailed daemon commands the space with his posture and infernal aura. The daemon overlord, arms crossed, controls the conversation with a low, guttural infernal voice to back it up.

Xymaran quartermaster.description: A lanky reptilian warrior clad in iron armor skulks about, pacing as he works through negotiations with the daemons of Golgar's lair.  His demeanor appears assertive, but respectful of the future relations for equipment supply.

Toucan.description: The toucan you are looking at looks right back at you.  The toucan is a rare, long-beaked, tropical bird.  They are large and could snap your fingers off in one shot; and would if you gave them a chance.

Python.description: This python is a BIG snake. I mean really big. So big infact, that pythons have been known to eat animals as large as a small goat!  They are hunted for their skins which fetch a handsome price on the market.

Monty.description: Monty is the father of this python clan.  He's big, beautiful, and not very nice.  As he grins at you, in his own little reptilian way, you can see his HUGE fangs.  Infact, they look rather sharp and poisonous.

Gypsy songstress.description: Clad in a simple dress of white and red, and adorned with glass beads and gaudy jewelery, she skips carelessly down the road humming softly to

Serious looking gypsy.description: He doesn't look as shiftless and untrustworthy of his fellows, but his smell still makes you want to keep your distance.

Vicious clicker.description: Hooked appendages grip the wall as this mandibled beast scrapes towards you, issuing a threatening series of clicks.

Daemon Golgar.description: The Demon Golgar, Lord of the Lair, is here.

Merman warrior.description: The merman of the Black Fin stands tall and proud, his muscular torso and powerful arms rippling with strength. His skin is a deep, midnight blue, marked with intricate tattoos that seem to writhe and twist like living things.

Merman hunter.description: The merman hunter of the Black Fin group is an imposing figure, standing taller and more muscular than most of his peers. His lean and athletic body is covered in sleek black scales, shimmering in the underwater light.

Shoal of fish.description: They move as one, constantly adjusting their formation in response to their environment, creating a fluid and ever-changing pattern. It's as if they are one organism, alive and pulsating with energy.

Barracuda.description: Its long, narrow body is covered in shimmering silver scales, and its pointed head is filled with sharp teeth. The barracuda is a fierce predator, using its speed and agility to catch smaller fish.

Tuna fish.description: The tuna has long, pointed fins and a forked tail that it uses to swim through the water with incredible agility. Its large eyes are set high on its head, giving it excellent vision to spot prey from a distance.

Electric blue fish.description: This fish has a sleek, streamlined body and vibrant blue scales. Its fins are long and flowing, trailing behind it like ribbons, and when it pauses in the water, they sway back and forth like the fronds of a delicate plant.

Sea urchin.description: A small, spiny creature that lives on the ocean floor. Its round body is covered in hard, shell-like plates that are covered in sharp, pointed

Octopus.description: A magnificent creature with long, slender arms and a bulbous head. Its body is covered in a network of suckers, which it uses to grip onto rocks and other surfaces as it moves through the water.

School of fish.description: The fish swim effortlessly, their movements perfectly synchronized as they weave in and out of the group in a mesmerizing display.

Elusive eel.description: It has a snakelike appearance, with a pointed head and a long, thin tail that tapers to a point. Its eyes are small and bead-like, set in deep sockets, and its mouth is filled with sharp, needle-like teeth.

Sea turtle.description: Its smooth, domed shell is a mottled pattern of greens and browns, providing a perfect camouflage among the swaying kelp forests and coral reefs. The turtle's movements are unhurried and deliberate.

Giant tube worm.description: Despite the hostile environment, the giant tube worm has adapted to this unique and extreme habitat, extracting energy from the chemicals found in the vent fluids and forming a crucial part of the ecosystem.

King crab.description: It moves its eight legs with surprising grace for such a large creature. You can see the sharp spikes on its legs, and you know that those claws could easily snap a finger or a small bone.

Reef shark.description: Its body is covered in a dark, mottled pattern that provides excellent camouflage against the reef. The shark's powerful tail propels it forward, while its sharp fins keep it maneuverable in the water.

Giant squid.description: Its long, slender body is covered in smooth, pale skin and is supported by eight powerful arms that are each lined with suckers and two longer tentacles that can extend up to twice the length of its body.

Dugong.description: Wielding tusk-like incisors, a large herbivorous marine mammal has spotted you.  Large nostrils act like valves as the female

Professor Valtor.description: to sparkle with excitement whenever he talks about alchemy. He has long, black hair that he tied back into a neat ponytail, and a small, well-kept beard.

Professor Kaida.description: As a respected scholar of marine biology, she has a deep understanding of the intricacies of underwater ecosystems and the complex relationships between their inhabitants. She is patient and encouraging with her students.

Professor Alaric.description: The professor is stern and serious individual, with an unyielding dedication to the craft of rune and glyph magic. They have short, cropped hair that is a deep shade of brown, and piercing blue eyes.

Male student.description: A tall and lean merman, with a chiseled physique that suggested he spent plenty of time swimming and training in the combat school. He has wavy black hair that is neatly styled.

Distinguished professor.description: The professor at the academy is a distinguished merfolk with a wealth of knowledge and experience. The professor is wearing formal attire, consisting of a long robe made of a light, flowing material that shimmers in the water.

Graceful female student.description: She has long, flowing hair the color of deep sea coral and bright, inquisitive eyes that seem to take in everything around her. She moves with

Academy guardian.description: The guard stands tall and vigilant, with broad shoulders and a muscular build. He wears a dark blue uniform that is adorned with golden trims, indicating his rank as a senior officer.

Nerissa.description: Her long hair shimmers with hues of seafoam green and deep indigo, and she wears delicate pearl earrings that complement the trinkets in her shop.

Mermaid servant.description: Despite her subservient role, she carries herself with a regal air and is always impeccably groomed. She wears a simple, yet elegant tunic made of woven kelp and carries out her tasks with grace and efficiency.

Merman servant.description: He wears a simple loincloth made of woven kelp, and carries himself with an air of quiet confidence and competence. His webbed hands are

Well-toned merman.description: A mixture of a built upper body and a scaled lower body make up a dashing young merman who appears to be approaching you.  Whether or not his glance is locked upon you or something behind you is still a question.
